title: Hammer Time
description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], all allies [gold]Forge[/gold] as well.
smart_description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], all allies [gold]Forge[/gold] as well.
notes: Triggers on the owner's forge action, causing all other alive allies to forge with the same amount. Prevents infinite loops by skipping if the source is already a HammerTimePower.
